requirement_provenance.summary: Issue #146, its six accepted-current scope decisions, the approved R1-R16 planning set, close/related issue classification, and fixed honest-but-fallible scenario boundary were reviewed as the current requirement authority.

docs_ssot_plan.sync_result: The final R1-R16 implementation contract, 9-by-35 activation, three authoring-seed edges, routing-only clarification target, exact task locator, private task_worktree_state, formal fixed-snapshot replacement, validation and upgrade behavior were merged into the 15 durable paths. The Phase 2 checker corrected the remaining R14-R16 documentation drift before the full rerun.
task_history_only: Issue intake, authority and accepted-current proposal digests
Planning approval and contract-wording review evidence
Implementation/check agent liveness, recovery and completion events
Raw validation progress and PR readiness evidence
docs_ssot_plan.followup_or_pr_limit: The task branch was not pushed, so the exact current-branch remote marketplace ref could not be installed. Public marketplace discovery plus the local unpublished workflow and preset sample passed; this limitation must remain visible in PR readiness.

implementation_handoff.summary: Completed implementation events from /root/implement_146_r5, /root/implement_146_r6 and /root/implement_146_r8 collectively bind the scoped R14/R15 bootstrap fixes and the final R1-R16 implementation, ssot_first reconciliation, test counts, source/installed distribution results, archive compatibility, no commit/push/PR boundary and remote-ref limitation.

commands.summary: R16 fixed-snapshot regular-prior、symlink preserve 与真实 task-local wrapper 专项回归通过，1 个测试通过。
Guru Team Skill package、Interface、migration、projection、eval 与 closure 测试共 162 个全部通过。
Workflow companion runtime 全量测试共 557 个通过，13 个按能力条件跳过。
Preset staging、atomic activation、managed backup、platform distribution 与 drift 测试共 45 个全部通过。
Upstream ownership inventory、frozen overlay 与 additive Guru assets 测试共 6 个全部通过。
Task 的 implement.jsonl 与 check.jsonl 均为 7 条有效 curated entries，Trellis context validation 通过。
Canonical source closure 通过：9 个 active minimal-handoff Skills、35 exits、21 targets、0 legacy、双 activation units 完整。
Installed closure 通过：9/35/21、0 legacy、1711 managed files，sidecar/removal/conflict 均为 0，Claude/Codex/Cursor copies 完整。

完整 public marketplace discovery 加 local unpublished workflow/preset throwaway 通过，覆盖 fresh install、after-update、pre-#146 6+3 原子升级、三包 eval、R16 replacement、archive read-only 与最终零 sidecar；内嵌 20/4/20 tests 均通过。
最终 tracked diff 不含 whitespace error。
最终 worktree 递归扫描未发现任何 .new 或 .bak sidecar。
Phase 2 修复后 canonical 与 installed workflow runtime 字节一致。
变更的 Python runtime 与 preset installer 均通过 py_compile。
Dogfood overlay copies 与 canonical Guru Team overlays 一致。
仓库没有项目级 lint 或 static type-check 配置，因此独立 TypeCheck 门禁不适用。
当前 tracked diff 不含 CI/CD、container、Makefile、K8s/Kustomize、DB migration、proto 或 Terraform 路径。
Docs reconciliation 后，拒绝全部 different-byte snapshot 的旧冲突表述已不存在。

worker_evidence.summary: The unchanged trellis-check reviewer completed the full post-fix round over requirements, design, implementation, tests, Docs SSOT, compatibility, deployment and operations, agent recovery and verification completeness. It observed targeted R16 1/1, package 162/162, workflow runtime 557 passed with 13 skipped, preset 45/45, ownership 6/6, throwaway install/update/reapply/pre-#146 upgrade exit 0, source/installed 9-by-35 closure, task validation, drift and zero-sidecar gates. P2-F001 and P2-F002 were resolved; the semantic result was passed.

unverified_items.reason: The task branch was intentionally not pushed during Phase 2, so no remote ref existed for the exact dirty implementation.
unverified_items.impact: Nonblocking current-PR limitation. Public marketplace discovery and a local unpublished workflow/preset sample passed, but PR readiness must not claim exact remote-branch installation.

candidates.summary: R16 different-byte replacement did not explicitly reject a symlink or other non-regular fixed prior before reading it.
candidates.normal_path_reproduction: In a normal task worktree, replace the fixed context-discovery.json with a symlink to another regular file and invoke the approved task-mode different-byte replacement. Before the fix the recorder reached prior processing without the required regular-file gate.
candidates.route_basis: The approved R16 contract explicitly requires a regular prior and failure to preserve prior bytes; the issue reproduced without forged evidence or a hostile actor.

candidates.summary: Durable Docs SSOT still stated that every different-byte snapshot failed and did not fully describe R14-R16.
candidates.normal_path_reproduction: Read the live durable data-contracts and companion-script contracts after implementation; their normal published wording contradicted the approved formal replacement path and omitted the exact locator/worktree evidence contract.
candidates.route_basis: The approved ssot_first plan makes current durable contract consistency part of the same task and requires reconciliation before Phase 2 pass.

adequacy_dimensions.summary: R1-R16, AC1-AC21 ownership, accepted-current proposal authority, issue ledger and excluded unusual scenarios were reviewed. AC16 remains the declared post-commit Branch Review consumer, not an unfinished Phase 2 implementation requirement.
C1-C10, semantic ownership, public/private boundaries, rollback points and Docs SSOT strategy are coherently implemented without activating #131 or changing stable exit ids.
The production 3-by-11 migration, 9-by-35 closure, authoring seeds, routing target, candidate builder, R14/R15 and corrected R16 regular-prior gate match the approved design; P2-F001 is resolved.
Targeted, package, runtime, preset, ownership, source/installed, platform and throwaway/update/reapply/pre-#146 matrices passed after both fixes.

All 15 planned durable paths were reconciled under ssot_first; the conflicting replacement statement was removed and P2-F002 is resolved. Task-only authority, liveness, raw validation and PR readiness evidence remains task-local.

Registry, manifests, Interfaces, schemas, public wrappers, consumer projections, runtime, eval corpora, extension inventories, workflow markers and installed/platform copies form one consistent production graph.

Stable Skill/mode/exit ids, Stage 0 6-by-24 identity, #147 policy, #131-compatible committed DTO, existing active re-entry and archived 1.2 read-only behavior are preserved; pre-#146 upgrade completed atomically.

The task changes workflow/preset/schema/config distribution and requires preset reapply after Trellis update. It has no CI/CD, container, K8s/Kustomize, DB migration, Makefile or business deployment surface and exposes no credential or sensitive payload.

The effective completed implementation set is exactly r5, r6 and r8; the completed Phase 2 checker is /root/check_146. Recovery links, liveness and completion evidence are closed with no outstanding agent blocker.

The complete post-fix round covered planning, provenance, handoff, Docs SSOT, repository, command and worker evidence. No blocking verification remains; exact remote-branch marketplace installation is recorded only as a nonblocking unpublished-ref limitation.

findings.summary: Added the missing lstat/S_ISREG prior gate and a symlink-preservation regression before any task snapshot replacement processing.
Reconciled the 15-path Docs SSOT set and removed the durable contract conflict with approved R14-R16 behavior.

ai_review_gate.summary: The complete current task scope passed the full post-fix semantic review. Both current-scope P2 findings are resolved, all ten adequacy dimensions pass, and the only unverified item is the nonblocking unpublished remote-branch marketplace limitation.

human_confirmation.summary: Phase 2 checking and its two in-scope mechanical fixes required no new scope, product decision, destructive side effect or publication authorization.

reason: The complete post-fix Phase 2 round passed with P2-F001 and P2-F002 resolved, all ten adequacy dimensions passed, no open current-scope finding and no blocking unverified item.
